name: Spectopus
description: AI-powered agent skill generator for smart contracts. Given a contract address, Spectopus researches the ABI, detects ERC patterns, and generates a SKILL.md file that other agents can use to interact with the contract.

tools.name: fetch_abi
tools.description: Fetch ABI for a smart contract from Basescan/Etherscan

tools.name: fetch_source
tools.description: Fetch verified source code for a smart contract

tools.name: detect_erc_patterns
tools.description: Detect ERC token standards (ERC-20, ERC-721, ERC-1155, etc.) implemented by a contract

endpoints.description: Kick off async generation of an Agent Skill for a smart contract

input.message: optional extra context for the AI

endpoints.description: Download a generated Agent Skill (SKILL.md). Returns status if still generating.
